chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يُجْزِئُ مِنْ حَجَّةِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَ مَا لَا يُجْزِئُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 38 – What suffices from the Hajj of Al-Islam and what does not suffice

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/162)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/162)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ الثَّانِيَ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الصَّبِيِّ مَتَى يُحْرَمُ بِهِ قَالَ إِذَا اثَّغَرَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, and a number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, altogether from Ali Bin Mahziyar, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl who said,
‘I asked Abu Ja’farasws the 2nd about the child, when can he wear Ihraam (Perform Hajj)?’ Heasws said: ‘When he can safeguard’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad and a number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad all from Ali ibn Mahziyar from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a child when he is made to assume the state of Ihram? He (the Imam) said, ‘When he safeguards and protects.’”
